characters.name: Aichan (Sample Character)
characters.description: Public sample character bundled with image-arranger: Aichan, a small demon-themed anime girl with magenta-violet hair, red horns, red eyes, compact bat wings, a devil tail, black hoodie, purple check dress, choker, gloves, stockings, and black boots. / image-arranger 同梱の公開サンプルキャラクター「AIちゃん」。ベースにはキー画像と設定資料を登録します。

master.overview: Aichan base references / AIちゃんベース参照
master.prompt: Aichan character reference: small demon-themed anime girl, magenta-violet layered shoulder-length hair with hot pink underside, red curved horns, red eyes, black choker, black hoodie, purple check dress with lace trim, black gloves, thigh-high stockings, black boots, compact red-black bat wings, long purple devil tail with red heart tip; keep identity, outfit, wing size, horn size, and tail shape consistent; no text, no logo, no watermark

accessory.overview: Horns, wings, and tail / 角・羽・しっぽ
accessory.prompt: Aichan attached parts reference: red curved horns on upper head, compact red-black bat wings on upper back, long purple devil tail with red heart tip attached at lower back; preserve size, curve, colors, and attachment points; no text, no logo, no watermark

expression.prompt: Aichan face close-up with bright smile, red eyes, magenta-violet layered hair, red horns, black choker, faithful to the base references; no text, no logo, no watermark
Aichan face close-up with neutral expression, red eyes, magenta-violet layered hair, red horns, black choker, faithful to the base references; no text, no logo, no watermark

clothing.overview: Hoodie and dress outfit / パーカーとワンピース
clothing.prompt: Aichan outfit reference: black oversized hoodie over purple check dress with lace trim, black choker with ring, fingerless gloves, thigh-high stockings with garter strap, chunky black boots; preserve silhouette and colors; no text, no logo, no watermark

background.overview: Clean reference background / 設定資料用背景
background.prompt: clean neutral reference-sheet background, white or light gray, no scene props, no text, no logo, no watermark

images.overview: Aichan portrait / AIちゃんポートレート
images.prompt: waist-up portrait of Aichan smiling at the camera, sunset seaside light, magenta-violet hair, red horns, red eyes, black hoodie, choker, compact bat wings visible, polished anime illustration, single character, no text, no logo, no watermark

images.overview: Aichan full-body scene / AIちゃん全身シーン
images.prompt: full-body illustration of Aichan standing in a clean studio reference pose, black hoodie, purple check dress, horns, wings, tail, boots, faithful to the design sheet, polished anime style, single character, no text, no logo, no watermark

videos.overview: Aichan reference turn, 8s / AIちゃん参照ターン（8秒）
videos.prompt: 0-2s: start on the Aichan key visual and hold the smiling face. 2-4s: slow push-in while hair and hoodie move subtly. 4-6s: gentle transition toward the design sheet pose, keeping horns, wings, tail, outfit, and eye color consistent. 6-8s: settle on a clean full-body reference view. No text, no logo, no watermark.

characters.name: Sample Game Assets
characters.description: Public sample for standalone image and video asset prompts. / 単発の画像・動画素材プロンプトを管理するサンプル。

master.prompt: one asset per prompt, no text, no logo, no watermark, clean reusable game material

accessory.prompt: create exactly one image, not a grid or collage

expression.prompt: stable image for a reusable asset library

clothing.prompt: wide game background, readable center area, no UI

images.overview: Wide background sample / 横長背景サンプル
images.prompt: wide clean training-room background, late afternoon light through tall windows, readable center area for UI overlays, no characters, no UI, no text
